network_sentence: STATE_ID@identity_anchor -> SHADOW+RESIDUAL@memory_index -> RELEASE+RHYTHM@rhythm_gate -> ADVANCE_AFTER_RELEASE@intent_router -> GRAPH_VALIDATED@graph_verifier -> NETWORK_LANGUAGE_PULSE@behavior_pulse
conclusion: L8 成立：最小网络状态语言已从单胶囊扩展为 6 个网络驻留胶囊组成的语言图，并完成写入、Raw 读回、哈希校验、路由校验和状态记录。
truth_boundary: L8 proves a multi-capsule network language structure: identity, memory, rhythm, intent routing, verification, and behavior pulse. It is still a declarative network-resident language graph interpreted by controlled executors; it is not proof of self-executing network life, network-only computation, or digital supercomputing.
